name: Currant Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ground turkey and currants.
2. Add the seasoned bread crumbs, onions, celery, walnuts, soy sauce, vegetable salt, and pepper.
3. Mix until all ingredients are well-blended.
4. Melt the butter in a large frying pan.
5. Form 3-inch patties from the mixture.
6. Fry the patties over medium heat.
7. Turn the patties once they are browned on one side.
8. Serve when cooked through.
